entries.en: Added `examples/merchant-quickstart`, a runnable merchant integration sample that provisions app-scoped provider config, redirects to `cashierUrl`, verifies notifications, and rechecks order status on the result page.
entries.zh-CN: 新增 `examples/merchant-quickstart`，提供可运行的商户接入示例，覆盖 app 作用域渠道配置初始化、跳转 `cashierUrl`、通知验签以及结果页查单兜底。
